items.title: Traveler Checkout Clarity Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve traveler booking confidence by clarifying cancellation terms, payment timing, and booking-state visibility across high-intent accommodation checkout flows.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase conversion by reducing decision uncertainty at checkout.
Increase later self-service success by making booking conditions clearer at purchase time.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase net room-night contribution by reducing avoidable booking drop-off and later support cost.

productBricks.change: Clarify reservation state and policy explanation across checkout.
Normalize payment timing and refund messaging.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated traveler web checkout flows.
Release booking-state and payment-model service changes.

items.title: Partner Visibility Control Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to help accommodation partners understand and improve visibility, occupancy quality, and promotion tradeoffs without relying on opaque manual heuristics.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase occupancy quality through clearer partner decision support.
Increase confidence in program and promotional actions.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase monetization by improving partner commercial action quality.

productBricks.change: Add visibility and outcome explanations in partner reports.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated partner performance and action surfaces.
